title: Visium HD Metadata Schema
description: FAIR-compliant metadata for 10x Genomics Visium HD data.

@context.description: JSON-LD context for linked data interoperability

microscope_image_found.description: Whether a microscope image was found in the directory

microscope_image_directory.description: Name of the directory containing microscope images

microscope_image_count.description: Number of microscope image files found

microscope_image_file.description: Name of the primary microscope image file

microscope_image_files.description: List of microscope image filenames (up to 5)

image_width.description: Width of the microscope image in pixels

image_height.description: Height of the microscope image in pixels

image_channels.description: Number of color channels in the microscope image

h5_files.description: List of H5/HDF5 files in the directory

feature_matrix_file.description: Name of the feature matrix H5 file
